race.comment: CAPTAIN FURAI (11) good win two-back, then raced closer to the speed in a fast run contest to finish third over 1400m here behind Modella. J Mac sticks from the inside barrier and expect to see him ridden a little quieter here. Leading contender. OUR QUEEN (13) lightly raced mare with a sound winning CV. Finished powerfully first-up with a comfortable victory over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Will sit up on the speed and prove hard to run down with the 53.5kg. AMREEKIYAH (14) consistent mare who gets map favours again after warming up late with a closing second over this track and trip. Genuine top-four player. LILAC (5) Group 3 winning mare over this trip last year, fitter after two runs back. Sat on the fast tempo with the 59kg when ninth over 1200m at Randwick. Better set-up for this and shapes as a genuine each-way prospect. CHARCOALS (6) stretches out to this distance for the first time after the two eye-catching runs this campaign. Keep safe despite drawing out.
